insight: Scorchilla and Iso Kronus are perceived as easy ways to beat Master Bot, suggesting the bot has difficulty handling fast or unconventional pressure from these units.
author: simmarine
context: simmarine reflected on bot games, noting these units tend to produce easy wins against Master Bot.

insight: Master Bot reportedly used to buy out the entire Arms Race supply before the human player had purchased Antima Comet, effectively denying the player the ability to build a large Antima. Namington noted this behavior may have been patched out.
author: namington
context: Discussion of bot behavior after undefeatedorca mentioned an 86-damage Antima used against a bot.
